server-sasConfig.__comment1: An array of blocks that'll be announced when mined for a player's first time
server-sasConfig.__comment2: An array of items that'll be announced when crafted for a player's first time
server-sasConfig.__comment3: An array of entity types that'll be announced when killed by a player for that player's first time
server-sasConfig.__comment4: An array of entity types that'll be announced when they kill a player for that player's first time
server-sasConfig.__comment5: An array of 'general stats' aka 'custom stats' that'll be announced when a player achieves them for their first time.
